race.comment: REGAL AWARD (4) never on the track on resumption with a respectable seventh over 1200m at Rosehill in the LR Darby Munro. Has excellent second-up credentials and ticks a few boxes over this trip from the good gate. Tongue-tie on and expected to go close. MARETH (8) fourth-up for this and ready for the 1400m. Warmed up late from near last on the turn with a tidy ninth over 1200m in the LR Darby Munro. Going better than the price suggests. BESKAR (1) was a month between runs when he got the dream run along the inside to cause an upset when taking out the LR Darby Munro over 1200m at Rosehill. Jumps in weight from the low draw and stays in the mix. SIRAGUSA (15) is undefeated in two starts on the country tracks and thrown in the deep end here. Keep safe.
